description_long: This is a modern, urban-style sofa featuring a combination of dark and light gray upholstery. The sofa has three large, loose back cushions in a deep black color, providing ample support and comfort. The seat is a single, continuous cushion in a lighter gray, with a subtle linear texture. On the left side, there is an integrated side table or armrest in matching light gray, extending beyond the seat and supported by wooden legs. The sofa stands on six slender, exposed wooden legs, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional, contemporary aesthetic suitable for public or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A modern gray sofa with three black back cushions, a built-in side table, and exposed wooden legs. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing three black back cushions, a single gray seat cushion, and the left-side integrated table/armrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the protruding side table/armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest, the full length of the side table/armrest, and the supporting wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sofa's profile, the arrangement of the legs, and the absence of a right armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose black back cushions and a single continuous gray seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and not visibly attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Single, wide, flat armrest integrated on the left side, extending as a side table; no armrest on the right side; armrest is at seat height and has a boxy, minimalist profile.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, straight wooden legs with a natural brown finish; legs are placed at the corners and along the length for support; all legs are exposed and evenly spaced.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest formed by three individual, loose cushions; backrest is segmented and not tufted or channeled.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a subtle linear texture on the seat; back cushions are smooth and unpatterned; no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
